metadata.name: Cement
metadata.title: Cement Settings
metadata.description: When laser cleaning cement, the key property to lead with is its brittleness compared to tougher masonry like stone. This makes it prone to cracking under heat, unlike denser bricks that hold up better. I've seen surfaces chip easily if you push too hard. So, start slow with gentle pulses to loosen grime without stressing the matrix. Tends to clean cleanly once you avoid over-heating the pores mid-pass. Adjust overlap minimally to prevent uneven wear.

author.name: Alessandro Moretti
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Assisted in EU Horizon 2020 laser additive projects, 2016-2019
author.imageAlt: Alessandro Moretti, Ph.D., Materials Engineer at Politecnico di Milano's Materials Dept., in research lab
